Package org.atmosphere.container

package org.atmosphere.container
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.atmosphere.container.version
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BlockingIOCometSupport
    This class is used when the AtmosphereFramework fails to autodetect the Servlet Container we are running on.
    EmbeddedWebSocketHandler
    websocketd support.
    JSR356AsyncSupport
    JSR 356 (Jakarta WebSocket) AsyncSupport implementation.
    JSR356AsyncSupport.AtmosphereConfigurator
     
    JSR356AsyncSupport.QuarkusAtmosphereConfigurator
     
    JSR356Endpoint
    JSR 356 (Jakarta WebSocket) Endpoint implementation that manages the WebSocket connection lifecycle — handshake, message dispatch, and close — within the Atmosphere framework.
    Servlet30CometSupport
    This class is used when the AtmosphereFramework detect the container detect Servlet 3.0 Asynch API.
